items.title: Service Routing Foundation Initiative
items.description: Completed work to improve queue rules, routing latency, and service-console visibility ahead of broader AI scaling.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve speed and consistency of assisted routing.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Reduce time lost to poor routing and queue churn.

productBricks.change: Improved routing quality and queue controls.

deliveryChannels.change: Rolled out improved routing visibility for supervisors.
